scenarios.title: At a Restaurant
scenarios.context_zh: 使用者在餐廳點餐，練習詢問、點菜與確認。

turns.ai_prompt: Greet the customer and ask what they want.
turns.sample_ai_reply: Welcome! What would you like to order?

turns.ai_prompt: Ask if the user wants a drink.
turns.sample_ai_reply: Would you like something to drink?
Great. One chicken set and water. Is that correct?
Perfect. Your meal will be ready soon. Thank you!

scenarios.title: Shopping at a Store
scenarios.context_zh: 使用者在商店購物，練習詢問價格、尺寸和顏色。

turns.ai_prompt: Greet and ask what the customer is looking for.
turns.sample_ai_reply: Hello! Can I help you find something today?
We have this shirt in blue, red, and black. What size do you need?

turns.ai_prompt: Ask if they want to try it on.
turns.sample_ai_reply: Would you like to try it on? The fitting room is over there.
Great! Shall I ring this up for you?

scenarios.title: Booking a Hotel
scenarios.context_zh: 使用者詢問旅館房間，練習預訂日期、房型和特殊需求。

turns.ai_prompt: Welcome the guest and ask about their booking.
turns.sample_ai_reply: Good afternoon. Welcome to our hotel. How can I help you with your reservation?

turns.ai_prompt: Ask about dates and room preferences.
turns.sample_ai_reply: Which dates will you be staying? And would you prefer a single or double room?
We have a lovely double room available for those dates at £120 per night. Is that suitable?
Do you have any special requests, such as a high floor or late breakfast?
Perfect! I'll confirm your reservation. You'll receive a confirmation email shortly.

scenarios.title: Asking Directions
scenarios.context_zh: 使用者在街上詢問方向，練習理解和給予位置指引。

turns.ai_prompt: Respond to someone asking for directions.
turns.sample_ai_reply: Hi! Where would you like to go?
Go straight ahead for two blocks.
Then turn right at the traffic light.
You'll see a big bank building on your left. The place is right next to it.

scenarios.title: At the Airport
scenarios.context_zh: 使用者在機場進行值機，練習護照、行李和登機手續相關用語。

turns.sample_ai_reply: Good morning! May I see your passport and ticket, please?
Do you have any luggage to check in today?
Two bags, that's fine. Your seat is 12A, window seat. Have you packed your luggage yourself?
Boarding will start at gate 5 at 10:45. Have a wonderful flight!

scenarios.title: Doctor's Appointment
scenarios.context_zh: 使用者在診所預約看病，練習描述症狀和預約時間。

turns.ai_prompt: Answer the phone as a medical receptionist.
turns.sample_ai_reply: Hello, Johnson's Medical Clinic. How can I help you?
What seems to be the problem? Are you a new patient?
The doctor can see you tomorrow at 2 PM or Thursday at 10 AM. Which is better for you?
Great! I've scheduled you for tomorrow at 2 PM. Please arrive 10 minutes early with your insurance card.

scenarios.title: Office Meeting
scenarios.context_zh: 同事之間進行工作會議討論，練習表達意見和徵求反饋。

turns.ai_prompt: Start the meeting and set the agenda.
turns.sample_ai_reply: Let's discuss the new project timeline. Everyone, please share your thoughts on the proposed deadline of June 30th.

turns.ai_prompt: Ask a colleague for their input.
turns.sample_ai_reply: Sarah, from your perspective as the project lead, do you think the team can meet this deadline?
That's a good point. We'll need to allocate more resources to the QA team then.
Alright, let's move forward with the June 30th deadline and increase the QA budget by 20%. Next meeting next Friday. Thank you all!
